PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-09-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alan Seher for Alba Gibbons.

Mr. Seher spoke of having the spouses original will, but not the Decedent's, stated that he met with the Decedent and his Wife on December 20th for estate planning, that they sat for one hour, that the Decedent gave him all of his files and stated that he could not find any originals, that he indicated that he had made no changes in the will or his trust and that Ms. Gibbons stated the same. Mr. Seher also stated that he prepared an engagement letter with the intention to up date the trust, that between that time the decedent transferred funds from the trust account to an individual account, and that the Decedent was in the process of opening another trust account with a broker, but then he died and it never happened. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is under submission. Status on close of estate is set for January 4, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
